name: Apple Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the brown sugar and salad oil together in a large bowl.
2. Add the egg, sour milk, baking soda, salt, vanilla, and cinnamon to the bowl with the brown sugar mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, diced apples, and chopped nuts to the batter, mixing until just combined.
4. Grease two 8-inch loaf pans with melted butter mixed with half a cup of sugar.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
